title: 只要努力就能成功
subtitle: Conditional Statements with 只要...就..., Expressing 'As Long As', Motivation and Success
assistant_message: Today we learn: conditional statements with 只要...就... (zhǐyào... jiù...), expressing 'as long as', talking about effort and success.

vocabulary.example_translation: as long as you work hard

grammar.point: Conditional with 只要...就... (As Long As... Then...)
grammar.explanation: Use 只要 to state a condition, and 就 to state the result. Structure: 只要 + Condition, 就 + Result.
grammar.explanation_id: Gunakan 只要 untuk menyatakan suatu kondisi, dan 就 untuk menyatakan hasil. Struktur: 只要 + Kondisi, 就 + Hasil.

examples.translation: As long as you work hard, you can succeed.
examples.translation_id: Asalkan kamu bekerja keras, kamu bisa berhasil.

examples.translation: As long as you persist, you will improve.
examples.translation_id: Asalkan kamu bertahan, kamu akan maju.

examples.translation: As long as there's an opportunity, I'll go.
examples.translation_id: Asalkan ada kesempatan, saya akan pergi.

grammar.explanation: Use phrases like 加油 (jiāyóu) and 别放弃 (bié fàngqì) to encourage someone.
grammar.explanation_id: Gunakan frasa seperti 加油 (jiāyóu) dan 别放弃 (bié fàngqì) untuk mendorong seseorang.

dialogue.speaker: male
dialogue.name: Zhang Wei
dialogue.chinese: 学汉语太难了，我想放弃。
dialogue.pinyin: Xué Hànyǔ tài nán le, wǒ xiǎng fàngqì.
dialogue.translation: Learning Chinese is too hard, I want to give up.
dialogue.translation_id: Belajar Mandarin terlalu sulit, saya ingin menyerah.

dialogue.speaker: female
dialogue.name: Li Mei
dialogue.chinese: 别放弃！只要坚持就能进步。
dialogue.pinyin: Bié fàngqì! Zhǐyào jiānchí jiù néng jìnbù.
dialogue.translation: Don't give up! As long as you persist, you can improve.
dialogue.translation_id: Jangan menyerah! Asalkan kamu bertahan, kamu bisa maju.

dialogue.speaker: female
dialogue.name: Li Mei
dialogue.chinese: 当然！只要努力就能成功。加油！
dialogue.pinyin: Dāngrán! Zhǐyào nǔlì jiù néng chénggōng. Jiāyóu!
dialogue.translation: Of course! As long as you work hard, you can succeed. Keep going!
dialogue.translation_id: Tentu saja! Asalkan kamu bekerja keras, kamu bisa berhasil. Semangat!

exercises.question: What does the structure 只要...就... express?
exercises.question_id: Apa yang diekspresikan oleh struktur 只要...就...?

exercises.question: How do you say 'As long as you work hard, you can succeed' in Chinese?
exercises.question_id: Bagaimana mengatakan 'Asalkan kamu bekerja keras, kamu bisa berhasil' dalam bahasa Mandarin?

exercises.question: How to say 'Don't give up' in Chinese?
exercises.question_id: Bagaimana mengatakan 'Jangan menyerah' dalam bahasa Mandarin?
